$comment: Per-version metadata for outline-cmr-take-2.md. Each entry corresponds to a snapshot file (or 'latest' for the canonical file).

versions.note: First-pass outline. §3 only carries the decomposition argument; §4 not yet detailed.
Expanded §3 with library-retrieval and the six-things synthesis. Detailed §4 subsections. Added 'Observations from making this outline' section.
§1 reframe: 'well-written prompt' → 'well-written prompt with the image each time'; dropped 'observes the image as it evolves' bullet (subsumed and obvious).
